item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 24s DOUBLES FOR DOUGH!
Danny Noppert hits six consecutive doubles to defeat Niko Springer 6-4
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 24s DOUBLES FOR DOUGH!
Danny Noppert hits six consecutive doubles to defeat Niko Springer 6-4 in what was a clinical display from the Dutchman.
The Freeze missed just two darts at double in the entire contest!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 1 111

item.title:
livedarts: Live Darts @livedarts · 1min 𝗡𝗢𝗣𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗧 𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗦 𝗢𝗙𝗙 𝗦𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗥
Danny Noppert defeats Niko Springer 6-4 in a repeat of last yea
item.description:
Live Darts @livedarts · 1min 𝗡𝗢𝗣𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗧 𝗦𝗘𝗘𝗦 𝗢𝗙𝗙 𝗦𝗣𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗘𝗥
Danny Noppert defeats Niko Springer 6-4 in a repeat of last year's Hungarian Darts Trophy final, averaging 98.3 with three 180s and 75% on the doubles Dannynoppert 58

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 1min Clinical Danny Noppert has beaten Niko Springer with an astonishing display on the outer ring.
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 1min Clinical Danny Noppert has beaten Niko Springer with an astonishing display on the outer ring.
The Freeze missed his first two darts at double in the match but then hit his next six to set up a quarter-final clash with Krzysztof Ratajski.
In association with @DiamondXDraws Mostrar más 20

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 1min A stunning bit of cueing from Ding Junhui!
#WorldChampionship | @taombilliards 1 185
item.description:
